publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-04-10 23:59:08 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Collection contains research, correspondence, and teaching materials relating to the professional career of Bernd Lambert. A number of the materials focus on his work in Kiribati.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Bernd Lambert was a professor of anthropology emeritus and a faculty member in Cornell University's College of Arts and Sciences. His studies included kinship among the Pacific islanders of the Republic of Kiribas.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Bernd Lambert papers, #14-25-4613. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Boxes 11, 21-22, and 26 are open for research. The remainder of the collection is closed until processed and reviewed.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Series contains Lambert's field notes, correspondence, and papers, as well as extensive census and genealogical records. While there are some exceptions, box 11 chiefly contains copies of materials in box 21.

did.unittitle: Ana Boki-Ni-Karaki Na Kaiea (original typescript, with marginal glosses). A partial translation of "Rairaueana's War" The marginal glosses are being copied on disk. Translation of "The Story of the Queen of Rats"
Nauruan vocabulary and grammatical examples copy #1
The First Census of Kiebu. Households with "B" Numbers
The Second Census of Kiebu. Households with "D" Numbers
The First Census of Makin Town. Households with "A" Numbers
The Plumeria Tree. Information from Nan Tebakaboo (except for when another source is given)
Genealogies . Table 4: the Descendencts of Touaiti and Kab'ab'ara; Table 8: Utibure and Utiroa. Copy 1

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Full list of tables on binder cover.

did.unittitle: Table 5: The aristocratic genealogy; Table 50: Tuutara of Makin Town. Copy 1

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Full list of tables on binder cover.

did.unittitle: Correspondence with Gilbert and Ellice Islands Colony (GEIC)
My review of Bourque and Warren/Regional Histories in Polynesia and Micronesia
Notes on Ana Bokinikaraki Na Kaiea. Turmeric
New Associaion in the Gilbert Islands
The Non-Use of Kinship Terms in the Gilbert Islands
Karakini Kiribati Bok 3. GEIC Education Dept. Curriculum Development Unit
Gilbertese vocabulary. Ellice vocabulary (first part). Original manuscript copies
Communications with the Government of Kiribati and necessary documents
The Social Organization of Female Sexuality
Canary yellow copy 2 (The Usees of Kinship Terms)
The Third Census of Makin Town. Households with "E" numbers. Copy 2
The Second Census of Kiebu. Households with "D" Numbers. Copy 2
The Third Census of Kiebu. Households with "F" numbers. Copy 2
Witoto culture. Bernd Lambert. Honors Thesis
Geneaologies . Table 4: the Descendencts of Touaiti and Kab'ab'ara; Table 8: Utibure and Utiroa. Copy 2
Table 5: The aristocratic genealogy; Table 50: Tuutara of Makin Town. Copy 2
Kiribati (Gilbertese) Peace Corps Language handbooks (2 vols.)

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Series is arranged based on material type. Card files follow the creator's arrangement. The first part of the file is arranged alphabetically by the last name of the cited author, while the second part is arranged alphabetically by subject. Zip disks and floppy disks are arranged together.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Series consists of new accession processed by the Processing Archivist into Box 27, 28, and 29 in April 2026.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Series contains research and personal files of Bernd Lambert. Bulk of series consists of bibliographic card file, which includes citations for scholoarly works in the field of anthroplogy. Series also includes zip disks and floppy disks with research files, personal files, and lecture notes.

did.unittitle: Bibliographic card file, R-Z, Subject card file
Classes, Spring 1998, 1999, Contemporary Prospects, Exams, Recommendations
